audit_items.proof_trace: The `bid()` function unconditionally checks `bidUsdValue < minBidUsdValue` (lines 433-435) before any auction settlement. `s_minBidUsdValue` is initialised in the constructor and can only be updated through `_setMinBidUsdValue()`, which rejects 0, guaranteeing a positive floor at all times. No alternative code path performs bid settlement outside `bid()`.
